text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We do not give up and we will let the field speak. As for our tongues, we will be busy remembering God Almighty. We reject negotiations with the usurping Israeli entity." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: They want to maintain their occupation and expand their occupation, so they are benefiting from an element they already have." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们不会放弃，我们将让战场说话。至于我们的舌头，我们将忙于纪念全能的上帝。我们拒绝与篡权的以色列实体进行谈判。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：他们想要维持他们的占领并扩大他们的占领，所以他们正在利用他们已经拥有的一个要素。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "The compass is from non-negotiation to direct negotiation, as is being proposed now. No one has the right to take Lebanon to this path without the internal agreement of its components, and this did not happen.…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We do not give up and we will let the field speak. As for our tongues, we will be busy remembering God Almighty. We reject negotiations with the usurping Israeli entity." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘指南针正从不谈判转向现在所提议的直接谈判。没有人有权在没有其内部组成部分达成一致的情况下将黎巴嫩带上这条道路，而这并没有发生……’” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们不会放弃，我们将让战场说话。至于我们的舌头，我们将忙于纪念全能的上帝。我们拒绝与篡权的以色列实体进行谈判。’ @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: Your Excellency, the President, they are pressuring you to confront your people. We are all citizens of the same country, and we will build and establish it together. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "The compass is from non-negotiation to direct negotiation, as is being proposed now. No one has the right to take Lebanon to this path without the internal agreement of its components, and this did not happen. This is part of the concession." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：总统阁下，他们正在向您施压，要求您对抗您的人民。我们都是同一个国家的公民，我们将共同建设和建立它。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘指南针正从不谈判转向现在所提议的直接谈判。没有人有权在没有其内部组成部分达成一致的情况下将黎巴嫩带上这条道路，而这并没有发生。这是让步的一部分。’ @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Chinese Defense Ministry: ‘Chinese ships continue to move in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran, which we will respect and abide by. We expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz, and has opened it to us.’ tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 中国国防部：‘中国船只继续在霍尔木兹海峡水域进出。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议，我们将尊重并遵守这些协议。我们希望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并已向我们开放。’ 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CBS: A former Pakistani national security adviser reports that Pakistan is working to get the U.S. and Iran back to the negotiating table after the first attempt in Islamabad failed. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CBS: U.S. and Iranian negotiation delegation leaders are continuing to engage with one another despite the failed Islamabad negotiations last week. An official reports that there is forward motion on trying to reach an agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 CBS：一位前巴基斯坦国家安全顾问报告称，在伊斯兰堡的首次尝试失败后，巴基斯坦正在努力让美国和伊朗回到谈判桌前。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CBS：尽管上周伊斯兰堡的谈判失败，美伊谈判代表团团长仍在继续接触。一位官员报告称，在试图达成协议方面取得了进展。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Former Brazilian intelligence chief Alexandre Ramagem has been arrested by ICE in the U.S. Ramagem fled Brazil in September after being convicted for plotting a coup with former President Jair Bolsonaro. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043745323231724010/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 前巴西情报局长亚历山大·拉马根已被美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）逮捕。拉马根在因与前总统雅伊尔·博索纳罗密谋政变被定罪后，于九月逃离巴西。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043745323231724010/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The naval blockade has been in full force for 3.5 hours. The IRGC had threatened it would began a harsh response, as well targeting the gulf ports. So far nothing. If they do not begin attacks, that may indicate that the regime has folded and will get back to the negotiating table. I still believe the gaps are extremely wide. They will need to give up the uranium, end terror proxy support and open up the strait. I’m feeling like the U.S. will get back to the negotiating table. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 海上封锁已全面实施3.5小时。伊斯兰革命卫队曾威胁要开始严厉回应，并瞄准海湾港口。到目前为止什么都没有发生。如果他们不开始攻击，这可能表明政权已经屈服，并将回到谈判桌前。我仍然认为分歧非常大。他们需要放弃铀、结束对恐怖代理人的支持并开放海峡。我觉得美国会回到谈判桌前。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to CBS News, engagement between the U.S. delegation and Iranian leaders has continued after the failed talks in Islamabad. ▪️ One official said there is “forward movement” toward reaching a potential agreement. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043744810264109181/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender District Judge Darrin P. Gayles, in a 17-page decision today, entirely dismissed a defamation lawsuit filed by U.S. President Donald J. Trump against the Wall Street Journal, Rupert Murdoch, CEO Robert Thomson and reporters Khadeeja Safdar and Joe Palazzolo, for their reporting on a creepy letter he purportedly wrote to commemorate the 50th birthday of convicted sex offender and trafficker Jeffrey Epstein in 2003. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 地方法官达林·P·盖尔斯（Darrin P. Gayles）在今天的一份17页裁决中，完全驳回了美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普对《华尔街日报》、鲁珀特·默多克、首席执行官罗伯特·汤姆森以及记者卡迪贾·萨夫达尔和乔·帕拉佐洛提起的诽谤诉讼，原因是他们报道了一封他据称在2003年为纪念被定罪的性犯罪者和人口贩运者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦50岁生日而写的令人毛骨悚然的信件。 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Large-scale Israeli attacks in the Nabatieh district, southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043744087283482920/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Axios, during talks in Islamabad over the weekend, the United States demanded that Iran suspend uranium enrichment for 20 years. ▪️ Iran responded by proposing a shorter timeframe — in the “single-digit years” range. ▪️ The U.S. also insisted that Iran fully remove its highly enriched uranium from the country, while Tehran agreed only to a “controlled process” to reduce enrichment levels. ▪️ The nuclear issue became the main obstacle preventing a deal. ▪️ Mediators from Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey are now working to narrow differences ahead of the April 21 ceasefire deadline. ▪️ Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said the deadline could be extended by 45–60 days to allow negotiations to continue. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据Axios报道，在周末的伊斯兰堡会谈中，美国要求伊朗暂停铀浓缩20年。 ▪️ 伊朗回应提议缩短时间框架——在“个位数年份”范围内。 ▪️ 美国还坚持要求伊朗将其高浓缩铀完全从该国移除，而德黑兰仅同意进行“受控过程”以降低浓缩水平。 ▪️ 核问题成为阻碍达成协议的主要障碍。 ▪️ 来自巴基斯坦、埃及和土耳其的调解人目前正在努力在4月21日停火截止日期前缩小分歧。 ▪️ 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹表示，截止日期可能会延长45-60天，以允许谈判继续进行。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Crypto exchange Kraken says a criminal group is attempting to extort the company, threatening to release videos of internal systems and client data. Kraken says no systems were breached and customer funds are safe. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043743567856775508/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 加密货币交易所Kraken表示，一个犯罪集团正试图勒索该公司，威胁要发布内部系统和客户数据的视频。Kraken表示没有系统被入侵，客户资金是安全的。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043743567856775508/photo/1 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "Iran is doing absolutely no business and we're gonna keep it that way very easily! Don't forget that Navy is gone, their Air Force is gone, their anti-aircraft is gone, their radar is gone, and their leaders are gone. It's a lot." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043743073990029369/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“伊朗绝对没有做任何生意，我们将非常容易地保持这种状态！别忘了他们的海军没了，他们的空军没了，他们的防空系统没了，他们的雷达没了，他们的领导人也没了。这很多。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043743073990029369/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Volodymyr Zelensky: 🗣️ “Ukraine’s defense industry is capable of producing millions of FPV drones per year, along with deep-strike capabilities, interceptor systems, and millions of shells. Ukraine also has its own long-range missile weapons. This is not just development — it is real power already in action: ‘Flamingo,’ ‘Ruta,’ ‘Peklo,’ ‘Neptune,’ ‘Palyanytsia,’ and ‘Alder.’ We can already be proud of this, but we will not stop here — this is only the beginning. The industry will continue to grow, and the enemy will feel it. Everyone sees the record range of our drones — 1,750 kilometers from our borders. This will increase further. It’s not about records, but about justice — one that will find evil anywhere in the world. Systems like ‘Sichen,’ ‘Liutyi,’ ‘Morok,’ ‘Bars,’ ‘Obriy,’ and FP are proof of that.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基：🗣️ “乌克兰国防工业每年能够生产数百万架FPV无人机，以及深度打击能力、拦截系统和数百万发炮弹。乌克兰也有自己的远程导弹武器。这不仅仅是发展——这是已经在行动的真正力量：‘火烈鸟’（Flamingo）、‘鲁塔’（Ruta）、‘地狱’（Peklo）、‘海王星’（Neptune）、‘帕利亚尼齐亚’（Palyanytsia）和‘桤木’（Alder）。我们已经可以为此感到自豪，但我们不会止步于此——这仅仅是个开始。工业将继续增长，敌人会感觉到这一点。每个人都看到了我们无人机的记录航程——距离我们边境1750公里。这将进一步增加。这不是关于记录，而是关于正义——一种能在世界任何地方找到邪恶的正义。像‘Sichen’、‘Liutyi’、‘Morok’、‘Bars’、‘Obriy’和FP这样的系统就是证明。”与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel I’m feeling like the U.S. will get back to the negotiating table. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 我觉得美国会回到谈判桌前。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @MarineTraffic : Two tankers turn away from Strait of Hormuz after US blockade begins At least two tankers reversed course near the Strait of Hormuz shortly after the start of the US blockade, highlighting the immediate impact on vessel movements. According to #MarineTraffic data, the 188-metre tanker Rich Starry turned back within minutes of approaching the chokepoint. The vessel had departed Sharjah Anchorage on 13 April and was sailing laden, with a reported draught of 11.3 metres, while signalling China as its destination. A second vessel, the 175-metre tanker Ostria, also reversed course after approaching the Strait. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）RT @MarineTraffic：两艘油轮在美国封锁开始后掉头离开霍尔木兹海峡。在美国封锁开始后不久，至少有两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡附近改变航向，凸显了对船舶航行的直接影响。根据#MarineTraffic数据，188米长的油轮“Rich Starry”号在接近咽喉要道几分钟内就掉头了。该船于4月13日离开沙迦锚地，满载航行，据报道吃水深度为11.3米，目的地显示为中国。第二艘船，175米长的油轮“Ostria”号，在接近海峡后也改变了航向。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "Many ships are heading to our country right now to load up with the best and sweetest. I don't know what exactly sweet is, but when it relates to oil it's a good thing." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043742468772864199/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“许多船只现在正前往我国装载最好和最甜的东西。我不知道什么是甜的，但当它涉及石油时，这是一件好事。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043742468772864199/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: For 15 months, we endured Israel's failure to implement any provision of the November 2024 agreement, and we remained patient. Despite hundreds of martyrs and wounded, diplomacy didn't make a single step…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: It's understandable that a country might not be able to confront its weaknesses and limitations, but it's unacceptable for that country to become a tool of Israel through pressure and government decisions that weaken its internal situation in the face of aggression. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：15个月来，我们忍受了以色列未能执行2024年11月协议的任何条款，我们保持了耐心。尽管有数百名烈士和伤员，外交没有迈出一步……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：一个国家可能无法面对其弱点和局限性是可以理解的，但该国通过压力和政府决定成为以色列的工具，从而在面对侵略时削弱其内部局势，这是不可接受的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Despite Trump’s orders to impose a naval blockade on Iranian ports and prevent ships from entering/exiting Iranian ports, oil tankers are still loading oil in Iran and are leaving these terminals, without interruption. @FotrosResistancee

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: We are facing a brutal Israeli-American aggression since the beginning of the Battle of the First Salvo, and there have been many developments that require an integrated position that reflects Hezbollah's…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: For 15 months, we endured Israel's failure to implement any provision of the November 2024 agreement, and we remained patient. Despite hundreds of martyrs and wounded, diplomacy didn't make a single step forward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：自‘第一轮齐射之战’开始以来，我们一直面临着残酷的以美侵略，发生了许多需要反映真主党立场的综合立场的发展……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：15个月来，我们忍受了以色列未能执行2024年11月协议的任何条款，我们保持了耐心。尽管有数百名烈士和伤员，外交没有迈出一步。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CBS: A former Pakistani national security adviser reports that Pakistan is working to get the U.S. and Iran back to the negotiating table after the first attempt in Islamabad failed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CBS：一位前巴基斯坦国家安全顾问报告称，在伊斯兰堡的首次尝试失败后，巴基斯坦正在努力让美国和伊朗回到谈判桌前。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: We are facing a brutal Israeli-American aggression since the beginning of the Battle of the First Salvo, and there have been many developments that require an integrated position that reflects Hezbollah's viewpoint. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：自‘第一轮齐射之战’开始以来，我们一直面临着残酷的以美侵略，发生了许多需要反映真主党观点的综合立场的发展。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Oil Ministry says oil export revenues in March fell to around “$1.95 billion,” marking a 71% decline from February. The sharp drop comes amid reduced output, with Iraq significantly cutting exports over the past month. According to OPEC data, Iraq’s crude oil production has decreased by around “61%,” reflecting a major contraction in supply. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克石油部表示，3月份石油出口收入降至约“19.5亿美元”，较2月份下降71%。这一急剧下降是在产量减少的情况下发生的，伊拉克在过去一个月大幅削减了出口。根据欧佩克数据，伊拉克的原油产量减少了约“61%”，反映了供应的重大收缩。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrikes targeted Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, moments ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭刚刚瞄准了黎巴嫩南部的纳巴泰。 @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Sheikh Naim is speaking right now
text_zh: ❗️ 纳伊姆谢赫正在讲话

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Deputy Chairman of Russia’s Security Council Dmitry Medvedev says while many countries seek to “de-block” the Strait of Hormuz, the White House has chosen to block it. He questions the policy, writing “blocking = de-blocking?” and criticising what he describes as contradictory actions. He adds that “Orwell’s villains are resurging,” warning that such logic echoes the idea that “war is peace.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 俄罗斯联邦安全会议副主席德米特里·梅德韦杰夫表示，虽然许多国家寻求“解除封锁”霍尔木兹海峡，但白宫却选择了封锁它。他质疑这一政策，写道“封锁=解除封锁？”，并批评了他所描述的矛盾行为。他补充说，“奥威尔笔下的恶棍正在复苏”，警告说这种逻辑呼应了“战争即和平”的观点。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 Dmitry Medvedev comments on the blocking of the blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫评论封锁的封锁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar said Ukraine is the victim in its war with Russia, adding that he cannot expect Ukraine to give up territory. "So everyone in Hungary knows that Ukraine is the victim of this war and that Ukraine, based…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar doesn't support accelerated EU accension for Ukraine. "From the beginning, we have said that we are not supporting the fast track, accession to the EU of Ukraine. It would be impossible that a country in war to be taken by the EU. These discussions cannot be held, all the chapters to discuss. So I don't think this has relevance, but I can see that there are some movements. So the people that we have spoken with, the member states, don't take this as a possible scenario. So all accession countries have to go through the same process." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔（Magyar）表示，乌克兰是俄乌战争的受害者，并补充说他不能指望乌克兰放弃领土。‘所以匈牙利每个人都知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者，乌克兰基于……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。‘从一开始，我们就说过我们不支持乌克兰加入欧盟的快速通道。一个处于战争状态的国家被欧盟接纳是不可能的。这些讨论无法进行，所有章节都需要讨论。所以我认为这没有意义，但我可以看到有一些动作。所以我们交谈过的人，成员国，并不认为这是一种可能的情况。所以所有加入国都必须经历同样的过程。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡️ Israel-Lebanon Talks Set to Begin Tomorrow in Washington at 2:00 p.m. GMT — Zionist media confirms first in-person preparatory meeting at U.S. State Department
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 以黎会谈定于格林威治标准时间明天下午2:00在华盛顿开始——犹太复国主义媒体证实了在美国国务院举行的首次面对面筹备会议

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar said Ukraine is the victim in its war with Russia, adding that he cannot expect Ukraine to give up territory. "So everyone in Hungary knows that Ukraine is the victim of this war and that Ukraine, based on the Budapest Memorandum of 1994, it is the job of any Ukrainian government to protect this territorial integrity and sovereignty and no one should tell them that at the, hopefully at the end of a four-year war, what, under what conditions they should enter peace or sign a peace treaty. So we cannot say any country to give up their territory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，乌克兰是俄乌战争的受害者，并补充说他不能指望乌克兰放弃领土。‘所以匈牙利每个人都知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者，乌克兰基于1994年的《布达佩斯备忘录》，保护这种领土完整和主权是任何乌克兰政府的工作，没有人应该告诉他们，在希望是四年战争结束时，他们应该在什么条件下进入和平或签署和平条约。所以我们不能说任何国家放弃他们的领土。’ @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Today marks the highest adaptation of FPVs by Hezbullah where they attacked 6 different locations Inshallah we have much more of these daily because the IDF is working in safe areas in the open and is a sitting duck. - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Yiftah base - Soldier staging area in Biet Hillel base - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Qiryat Shmona - Command room to manage firepower and military tent near Kfar Giladi artillery battery - Military room and tent in Kfar Giladi barracks - Military room and tent in Margaliot
text_zh: ❗️ 今天标志着真主党对FPV无人机的最高适应，他们袭击了6个不同的地点。因沙安拉（Inshallah），我们每天会有更多这样的袭击，因为以色列国防军在开阔的安全区域工作，就像瓮中之鳖。 - Yiftah基地的士兵宿舍 - Biet Hillel基地的士兵集结区 - Qiryat Shmona的士兵宿舍 - 管理火力的指挥室和Kfar Giladi炮兵连附近的军事帐篷 - Kfar Giladi军营的军事室和帐篷 - Margaliot的军事室和帐篷

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on if he would send Vice President Vance to negotiate with Iran again: "Well, he's done a good job. Steve and Jared, they've all done a very good job. And, I can tell you that we've been called by the other side. They'd like to…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump on China and Xi Jinping: ..We have a very good relationship with China. He would like to see [the war in Iran] ended also. He certainly wants it ended. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普关于他是否会再次派遣副总统万斯与伊朗谈判：‘嗯，他做得很好。史蒂夫和贾里德，他们都做得很好。而且，我可以告诉你，我们接到了对方的电话。他们想……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普关于中国和习近平：……我们与中国关系很好。他也希望看到[伊朗战争]结束。他当然希望它结束。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran: Iran will not have a nuclear weapon... If they don't agree, there's no deal. There'll never be a deal. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon and we're going to get the dust back — either we'll get it back from them or…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on if he would send Vice President Vance to negotiate with Iran again: "Well, he's done a good job. Steve and Jared, they've all done a very good job. And, I can tell you that we've been called by the other side. They'd like to make a deal very badly, very badly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普关于伊朗：伊朗不会拥有核武器……如果他们不同意，就没有协议。永远不会有协议。伊朗不会拥有核武器，我们将拿回尘埃——要么我们从他们那里拿回，要么……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普关于他是否会再次派遣副总统万斯与伊朗谈判：‘嗯，他做得很好。史蒂夫和贾里德，他们都做得很好。而且，我可以告诉你，我们接到了对方的电话。他们非常、非常想达成协议。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: Do you think men should play in women's sports? DoorDash worker: I really don't have an opinion on that.
text_zh: 特朗普：你认为男人应该参加女子体育比赛吗？DoorDash员工：我真的对此没有意见。

text: 📝 Important to note: Trump’s threats aren’t just directed at Iran; they target any country or ship that pays a toll to Iran to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. “No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage.” — Trump
text_zh: 📝 重要提示：特朗普的威胁不仅针对伊朗；它们针对任何向伊朗支付通行费以通过霍尔木兹海峡的国家或船只。“任何支付非法通行费的人都不会有安全通道。” — 特朗普

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan: Senior IDF officials have briefed Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, ahead of his meetings with Lebanese ambassador Nada Hamada Maoued in Washington. The unusual briefing was requested by the ambassador and approved by…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : A political source in the anti‑Hezbollah camp in Lebanon expressed pessimism ahead of Tuesday’s direct talks between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington, saying progress will be difficult as long as Lebanon prioritises a ceasefire over disarming Hezbollah. Behind the scenes, a struggle is under way between Hezbollah’s Shia camp, which seeks only a ceasefire, and the opposing camp pushing for disarmament. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan：以色列国防军高级官员在以色列驻美国大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）与黎巴嫩大使娜达·哈马达·马乌德（Nada Hamada Maoued）在华盛顿会晤前向其通报了情况。这次不同寻常的简报是由大使要求的，并得到了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：黎巴嫩反真主党阵营的一位政治消息人士在周二以色列和黎巴嫩大使在华盛顿举行直接会谈前表示悲观，称只要黎巴嫩优先考虑停火而不是解除真主党武装，进展将很困难。在幕后，真主党的什叶派阵营（只寻求停火）与推动解除武装的对立阵营之间正在进行一场斗争。 @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor. It had to do with the Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker.
text_zh: 记者：你发布了那张你自己被描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：我确实发布了它，我以为那是作为医生的我。它与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作人员。
